meaning: adj.引起麻烦的,令人烦恼的
examples: Here was treasure-hunting under the happiest auspices--there would not be any bothersome uncertainty as to where to dig.
Just because I would not listen to that bothersome Cricket, who knows how many misfortunes may be awaiting me!
But this is starting to get bothersome.
Cutting back on soda and sweeteners will likely lead to dramatic improvement of these bothersome symptoms.
Put food and energy back in, and the rise is a more bothersome 3.1%.
